title: French Persian Cabbage Salad
description: A refreshing French-inspired salad featuring shredded cabbage, crunchy persian cucumber and a hint of cool iced lettuce.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine shredded cabbage, sliced persian cucumber, and mixed greens salad.
In a small bowl, whisk together a vinaigrette made from olive oil and apple cider vinegar.
Drizzle the vinaigrette over the salad and toss to coat.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, sprinkle with chopped fresh herbs such as parsley or dill, if desired.
To make the vinaigrette, combine 2 tablespoons of olive oil and 1 tablespoon of apple cider vinegar in a small bowl.
Whisk until smooth and season with salt and pepper to taste.
